human_actions_pending.context: Needed to test Phase 7 SSH transport end-to-end. The API returns total_count=0 meaning zero codespaces exist.

decisions.decision: Phase 7 v1 transport = gh codespace ssh --stdio subprocess
decisions.rationale: Sidesteps native russh+gRPC tunnel plumbing (v1.x). gh handles all tunnel protocol.

decisions.decision: CodespaceDomain lives in vector-ssh, not vector-mux
decisions.rationale: Keeps WIN-04 seam clean — mux takes Box<dyn PtyTransport> directly, not russh types.
Stable title prevents unbounded SSH key growth on github.com/settings/keys.
Multiple files modified across sessions, need to commit before executing phase 7.
